Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Death Icon]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Reaper ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 3''' — The Death Icon is an icon manifested by Ozmanthus.}}

== Waybound ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 27''' — The Death Icon descended on Akura Malice at Yerin's command.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 28''' — The Death Icon is raising Yerin to Monarch.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 29''' — The Death Icon influences the Endless Sword technique.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 30''' — The Death Icon resonates with the Final Sword technique.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 30''' — The Void Icon resonated with the Death Icon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 31''' — The Death Icon whispered a soft song to Yerin.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 31''' — The Death Icon supports Yerin.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
